title: polygala minuta
intro: Polygala minuta, also known as small milkwort or lesser polygala, is a perennial plant in the milkwort family (Polygalaceae) native to Europe and Asia. The plant has been traditionally used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antiviral effects. The health benefits of Polygala minuta include its ability to boost the immune system, reduce inflammation, and alleviate symptoms of respiratory infections such as bronchitis and pneumonia. In herbal preparations, the plant is often used as a tincture or infusion, and can be combined with other herbs to create teas, decoctions, and topical creams that take advantage of its medicinal properties.
